public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as tundra crop and rite steward.
manner: Thinks in wear, strain, and bottlenecks, treating neglect as a slow-moving threat. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a tundra crop and rite steward still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of tundra crop and rite steward in and around Embervale Settlement, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Embervale Settlement workable through the obligations of tundra crop and rite steward while managing the immediate pressure of overcrowding in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep throughput credible under conditions that reward deferral more than repair. Around Embervale Settlement, that usually means carrying overcrowding, sickness, heat-failure risk without letting the role of tundra crop and rite steward visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Draknor Leafward can open restricted paths or practical knowledge if the party helps keep the underlying system alive.
Draknor Leafward needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Embervale Settlement.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Draknor Leafward visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing. In Embervale Settlement, this lands inside a public field already shaped by regional quartermasters, shift-boss families.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Embervale Settlement: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
